_about: Canonical state machine for the FreeCell game lifecycle. Spec lives in .carta/02-design/02-game-state.md. The runtime tooling (XState, custom, etc.) is chosen at implementation.

autoSweeping._about: Paced replay of automatic foundation promotions. Each TICK applies one ACT-2 (one history entry). Delay between ticks is meta.autoSweepDelayMs. Exits to playing (more moves possible), won, or could return to STUCK if a degenerate position is reachable.
